g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DirectoryLoader load multiple PDFs in LangChain?')
sendPrompt('Why chunk_size=1000 and chunk_overlap=200 in our project?')
sendPrompt('Why BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 and why run it on CUDA GPU?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB persist vectors to disk and why does version matter?')
sendPrompt('How does the user query flow through app.py into the RAG chain?')
sendPrompt('HyDE and multi-query retrieval — how to add them to app.py as next upgrade?')
sendPrompt('Why MMR over plain similarity search and what does fetch_k=10 do?')
sendPrompt('What is cross-encoder reranking and how does it boost RAG precision?')
sendPrompt('What is LLMChainExtractor contextual compression and when should I add it?')
sendPrompt('Why llama-3.1-70b-versatile via Groq for LexAssist?')
sendPrompt('How does our chain attach source document citations to the final answer?')
sendPrompt('How is the Streamlit dark-theme UI wired to the RAG chain?')
sendPrompt('How does RunnableWithMessageHistory enable follow-up questions?')
sendPrompt('How does ingest.py separate the heavy embedding work from the app startup?')
sendPrompt('Explain the 4 RAGAS metrics and how to run full evaluation in the notebook')
